KeystonePassive.name: Resolute Technique
description: Accuracy Rating is Doubled
Never deal Critical Hits

KeystonePassive.name: Giant's Blood
description: You can wield Two-Handed Axes, Maces and Swords in one hand
Triple Attribute requirements of Martial Weapons
Inherent Life granted by Strength is halved

KeystonePassive.name: Unwavering Stance
description: Cannot be Light Stunned
Cannot Dodge Roll or Sprint

KeystonePassive.name: Avatar of Fire
description: 75% of Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Deal no Non-Fire Damage

KeystonePassive.name: Blood Magic
description: You have no Mana
Skill Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs

KeystonePassive.name: Zealot's Oath
description: Excess Life Recovery from Regeneration is applied to Energy Shield
Energy Shield does not Recharge

KeystonePassive.name: Ancestral Bond
description: Your Totem Limit is doubled
No Charge requirement for placing Totems
Totems reserve 75 Spirit each

KeystonePassive.name: Pain Attunement
description: 30% less Critical Damage Bonus when on Full Life
30% more Critical Damage Bonus when on Low Life

KeystonePassive.name: Chaos Inoculation
description: Maximum Life is 1
Immune to Chaos Damage and Bleeding

KeystonePassive.name: Eldritch Battery
description: Convert 100% of maximum Energy Shield to maximum Mana
Mana Costs are Doubled

KeystonePassive.name: Mind Over Matter
description: All Damage is taken from Mana before Life
50% less Mana Recovery Rate

KeystonePassive.name: Whispers of Doom
description: You can apply an additional Curse
Double Activation Delay of Curses

KeystonePassive.name: Necromantic Talisman
description: All bonuses from Equipped Amulet apply to your Minions instead of you

KeystonePassive.name: Conduit
description: If you would gain a Charge, Allies in your Presence gain that Charge instead

KeystonePassive.name: Resonance
description: Gain Power Charges instead of Frenzy Charges
Gain Frenzy Charges instead of Endurance Charges
Gain Endurance Charges instead of Power Charges

KeystonePassive.name: Eternal Youth
description: Life Recharges instead of Energy Shield
50% less Life Recovery from Flasks

KeystonePassive.name: Primal Hunger
description: 100% more Maximum Rage
Regenerate 1 Rage per second per 4 Rage spent Recently
No Rage effect

KeystonePassive.name: Dance with Death
description: 25% more Skill Speed while Off Hand is empty and you have
a One-Handed Martial Weapon equipped in your Main Hand

KeystonePassive.name: Heartstopper
description: Take 50% less Damage over Time if you've started taking Damage over Time in the past second
Take 50% more Damage over Time if you haven't started taking Damage over Time in the past second

KeystonePassive.name: Oasis
description: Cannot use Charms
30% more Recovery from Flasks

KeystonePassive.name: Vaal Pact
description: 50% more amount of Life Leeched
Leech Life 67% less quickly
Cannot Recover Life other than from Leech
Life Leech effects are not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled

KeystonePassive.name: Iron Reflexes
description: Converts all Evasion Rating to Armour

KeystonePassive.name: Glancing Blows
description: Chance to Evade is Unlucky
Chance to Deflect is Lucky

KeystonePassive.name: Elemental Equilibrium
description: Create Lightning Infusion Remnants instead of Fire
Create Cold Infusion Remnants instead of Lightning
Create Fire Infusion Remnants instead of Cold

KeystonePassive.name: Bulwark
description: Dodge Roll cannot Avoid Damage
Take 30% less Damage from Hits while Dodge Rolling

KeystonePassive.name: Crimson Assault
description: Bleeding you inflict is Aggravated
Base Bleeding Duration is 1 second
50% more Magnitude of Bleeding you inflict

KeystonePassive.name: Trusted Kinship
description: You can have two Companions of different types
30% more Reservation Efficiency of Companion Skills
20% less Reservation Efficiency of non-Companion Skills

KeystonePassive.name: Hollow Palm Technique
description: Can Attack as though using a Quarterstaff while both of your hand slots are empty
Unarmed Attacks that would use an Equipped Quarterstaff's damage have:
• Base Unarmed Physical damage replaced with damage based on their Skill Level
• 1% more Attack Speed per 75 Item Evasion on Equipped Armour Items
• +0.1% to Critical Hit Chance per 10 Item Energy Shield on Equipped Armour Items

KeystonePassive.name: Blackflame Covenant
description: Fire Spells Convert 100% of Fire Damage to Chaos Damage
Chaos Damage from Fire Spells Contributes to Flammability and Ignite Magnitudes
Ignite inflicted with Fire Spells deals Chaos Damage instead of Fire Damage

KeystonePassive.name: Ritual Cadence
description: Invocation Skills instead Trigger Spells every 2 seconds
Invocation Skills cannot gain Energy while Triggering Spells
Invoked Spells consume 50% less Energy

KeystonePassive.name: Scarred Faith
description: 5% of Physical Damage prevented Recouped as Energy Shield per enemy Power
Energy Shield does not Recharge
You cannot Recover Energy Shield from Regeneration
You cannot Recover Energy Shield to above Armour

KeystonePassive.name: Lord of the Wilds
description: You can equip a non-Unique Sceptre while wielding a Talisman
50% less Spirit
Non-Minion Skills have 50% less Reservation Efficiency

KeystonePassive.name: Wildsurge Incantation
description: Storm and Plant Spells:
• deal 50% more damage
• cost 50% less
• have 75% less duration

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Black Scythe Training
description: Gain no inherent bonus from Strength
1% increased Energy Shield per 2 Strength

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Circular Teachings
description: Gain no inherent bonus from Dexterity
1% increased Armour per 2 Dexterity

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Knightly Tenets
description: Gain no inherent bonus from Intelligence
1% increased Evasion Rating per 2 Intelligence

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Sacrifice of Flesh
description: When taking damage from Hits, 20% of Life Loss is prevented, then 150% of Life Loss prevented this way is Lost over 4 seconds

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Sacrifice of Loyalty
description: You deal 1% more Damage per 2 total Power of your Undead Minions
Undead Minions have 25% less maximum Life

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Sacrifice of Mind
description: Mana Recovery from Regeneration Overflows maximum Mana
50% less Mana Regeneration Rate

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Sacrifice of Blood
description: Regenerate 1 Life per second per 16 Life spent in the past 4 seconds
20% more Life Cost of Skills

TimelessJewelKeystone.name: Sacrifice of Sight
description: Projectiles do one of the following at random:
• Fork an additional time
• Chain an additional time
• Chain from Terrain an additional time
• Cannot collide with targets
